response.text: Relevant source files: internal/booking/reservation.go defines the Status constants; internal/booking/lifecycle.go defines the permitted transitions in CanTransition; internal/api/reservations.go routes the endpoints that trigger transitions. Relevant test: internal/booking/lifecycle_test.go pins the transition matrix. The lifecycle is pending -> confirmed -> completed, with cancelled reachable from pending and confirmed.
